title: veronica cana subsp. miqueliana
intro: Veronica cana subsp. miqueliana, also known as Miquel's Veronica, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the broomrape family, Plantaginaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Veronica cana subsp. miqueliana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems.
